message:
feat: Add budget manager and usage profiler for adaptive context

Budget Manager (Phase 3):
- Implement tier selection based on memory pressure, hints, and profiling
- Add dynamic resizing with checkAndResize() and checkShrink()
- Support all trigger types (token count, memory, hints, profiling)
- Include token estimation and tier conversion helpers

Usage Profiler (Phase 4):
- Implement pattern learning with success/failure tracking
- Add getPredictedTier() for historical predictions
- Support saving/loading profiles to disk
- Implement automatic pruning of old patterns
- Track per-tier usage distribution

Part of Phases 3-4: Adaptive Context Budget implementation
